name: zsys_resolve_cpu_benchmark_packet
description: CpuBenchmarkResolver::ResolveCpuBenchmarkPacket chooses the CPU benchmark path from CPU class and feature evidence and copies the benchmark result.
known_limits: The smoke verifies the caller-visible zSys::GetCpuMhz path and normalized CPU feature helpers on the runtime CPU.
Binary-safe verification remains blocked by timer/raw-CPU helper shape and compiler scheduling differences.
